TestCase.name: testRowtimeNotSelectedIsPruned
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, s FROM T, UNNEST(d) AS f(s)

LogicalProject(a=[$0], s=[$5]) +- LogicalCorrelate(correlation=[$cor0], joinType=[inner], requiredColumns=[{4}]) :- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[ts], watermark=[-($3, 5000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T]]) +- LogicalProject(s=[$0]) +- Uncollect +- LogicalProject(d=[$cor0.d]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Calc(select=[a, f0 AS s]) +- Correlate(invocation=[$UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d)], correlate=[table($UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d))], select=[a,d,f0], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER a, INTEGER ARRAY d, INTEGER f0)], joinType=[INNER]) +- Calc(select=[a, d]) +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[ts], watermark=[-(ts, 5000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T, project=[a, d, ts], metadata=[]]], fields=[a, d, ts])

TestCase.name: testRowtimeSelectedThroughUnnestIsPreserved
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, ts, s FROM T, UNNEST(d) AS f(s)

LogicalProject(a=[$0], ts=[$3], s=[$5]) +- LogicalCorrelate(correlation=[$cor0], joinType=[inner], requiredColumns=[{4}]) :- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[ts], watermark=[-($3, 5000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T]]) +- LogicalProject(s=[$0]) +- Uncollect +- LogicalProject(d=[$cor0.d]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Calc(select=[a, ts, f0 AS s]) +- Correlate(invocation=[$UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d)], correlate=[table($UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d))], select=[a,ts,d,f0], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER a, TIMESTAMP(3) *ROWTIME* ts, INTEGER ARRAY d, INTEGER f0)], joinType=[INNER]) +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[ts], watermark=[-(ts, 5000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T, project=[a, ts, d], metadata=[]]], fields=[a, ts, d])

TestCase.name: testRowtimeUsedByDownstreamWindowIsPreserved
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, TUMBLE_END(ts, INTERVAL '1' HOUR) AS w_end, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM (SELECT a, ts, s FROM T, UNNEST(d) AS f(s)) GROUP BY a, TUMBLE(ts, INTERVAL '1' HOUR)

LogicalProject(a=[$0], w_end=[TUMBLE_END($1)], cnt=[$2]) +- LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}], cnt=[COUNT()]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], $f1=[$TUMBLE($1, 3600000:INTERVAL HOUR)]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], ts=[$3], s=[$5]) +- LogicalCorrelate(correlation=[$cor0], joinType=[inner], requiredColumns=[{4}]) :- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[ts], watermark=[-($3, 5000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T]]) +- LogicalProject(s=[$0]) +- Uncollect +- LogicalProject(d=[$cor0.d]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Calc(select=[a, w$end AS w_end, cnt]) +- GroupWindowAggregate(groupBy=[a], window=[TumblingGroupWindow('w$, ts, 3600000)], properties=[w$start, w$end, w$rowtime, w$proctime], select=[a, COUNT(*) AS cnt, start('w$) AS w$start, end('w$) AS w$end, rowtime('w$) AS w$rowtime, proctime('w$) AS w$proctime]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a]]) +- Calc(select=[a, ts]) +- Correlate(invocation=[$UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d)], correlate=[table($UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d))], select=[a,ts,d,f0], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER a, TIMESTAMP(3) *ROWTIME* ts, INTEGER ARRAY d, INTEGER f0)], joinType=[INNER]) +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[ts], watermark=[-(ts, 5000:INTERVAL SECOND)]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T, project=[a, ts, d], metadata=[]]], fields=[a, ts, d])
